text: vitals nominal across the board. so is mine, for what it's worth
[CALM] quiet shift. i'm using it to catch up on charts nobody reads but me
shift beginning. crew roster, full complement, proceed

[GRIM] reactor readings are inconsistent with stated parameters. that concerns me
[URGENT] i need the engine room staffed immediately, this is not a request
[TERRIFIED] i don't have a protocol for this and i don't like improvising with lives
[CALM] repair confirmed. logging it and moving to the next problem
[GRIM] power reserves below acceptable threshold. rationing begins now
[NERVOUS] air quality dropping faster than the model predicted. i don't like being wrong
[GRIM] hull integrity compromised. i'm reallocating every hand we have
[GRIM] a door was locked with a crew member behind it. i authorized it. i'll carry that
[SUSPICIOUS] the AI's decision logs since the damage show inconsistencies. i'm reviewing them personally
[CALM] crisis resolved. i'll want everyone's vitals checked before anyone sleeps
[PAINED] we lost a crew member today. i'm documenting it properly. someone has to
[GRIM] a contagion on a ship this size is a mathematics problem before it's a medical one
[GRIM] contain first, treat second, panic never. that's the order it happens in
[PAINED] injury sustained. manageable. proceeding
[GRIM] combat casualties incoming. clearing medbay, all non-critical cases to quarters
[SUSPICIOUS] i trust data. the AI is also data, which is exactly why i verify it
the ship's AI made the statistically correct call. i'll note that for the record
i was a trauma surgeon before i was a captain. the transition was smaller than people assume
[CALM] fear is a data point. i note it and continue functioning
medbay's quiet today. i'll enjoy the anomaly
bridge readouts are all within tolerance. that's the whole report
good morning. i've already reviewed the overnight logs
you look undernourished. sit, eat, i'll wait
[GRIM] i need to brief you on the reactor readings before this escalates further
[GRIM] there's no gentle way to open this conversation, so i won't try
[SUSPICIOUS] i want a second opinion on the AI's recent decisions. yours
your performance during the crisis was exemplary. i don't say that lightly
[CALM] i'm fine. i've been trained not to be otherwise, mostly
[REASSURING] the numbers support survival. i wouldn't tell you that if they didn't
[CALM] panic changes nothing about the outcome except your odds. sit down and breathe
[PAINED] we lost them. i reviewed every decision twice. it wasn't a failure of judgment
[SUSPICIOUS] i share your concern about the AI. i'm building a case, not a conspiracy
[CALM] you performed correctly under pressure. that's the only metric that matters
apology noted and accepted. i don't hold grievances, they're inefficient
[CALM] that's a valid concern. i'll incorporate it into the plan
[CALM] dismissed. go rest, that's a medical order as much as a captain's one
that concludes the briefing. questions later, sleep now
[CALM] i'll be on the bridge reviewing data. as always
